scope: ACL27 supplement systematic visual scan, Figure S37 theory visual bridge on PDF page 39
user_report: Continue scanning the ACL supplement for obvious occlusion, wrong scaling, and incomplete figure display after AI-slot containment updates.

finding.defect: The Grounding contract band embedded the full VLM clean-rerender panel into a narrow bridge band using cover-style scaling. The nested target-view strip appeared as a partially visible sliver rather than complete registered target-box evidence.

root_cause: build_theory_bridge placed VLM_CLEAN_RERENDER with _fit(..., cover=True) inside the Grounding contract band. The source panel is a multi-row atlas, so cover fitting into the short band cropped away most of the target-view rows before LaTeX included the PNG.
changes: Added _compose_grounding_contract_bridge(size) to build four complete target-box pair cards for backpack, clock, bottle, and cup.
Replaced the Grounding contract band image in build_theory_bridge with _compose_grounding_contract_bridge((image_w, band_image_h)).
Used contained source crops from fig_supplement_vlm_clean_rerender_panel.png rather than cover-fitting the full source atlas.
Added regression assertions that the theory bridge uses the dedicated grounding-contract compositor and does not return to _fit(VLM_CLEAN_RERENDER, (image_w, band_image_h), cover=True).
Regenerated fig_supplement_theory_evidence_bridge.png and rebuilt the ACL27 supplement PDF.

local_visual_review.reviewer: Codex local visual review using the paper figure protocol from render-visual-reviewer and browser-visual-review; no independent subagent was used in this pass.
local_visual_review.before_verdict: FAIL. On the round3 rendered page 39, the Grounding contract row showed only a half-visible strip from the larger VLM panel, so the target-box evidence was not complete at reader scale.
local_visual_review.after_standalone_verdict: PASS. The standalone Figure S37 bridge now shows four complete target-box pair cards in the Grounding contract band.
local_visual_review.after_pdf_page39_verdict: PASS. In the final rendered PDF page 39, the four Grounding contract cards are visible, the figure remains inside the page, and the caption does not collide with the page footer.
local_visual_review.global_rescan_verdict: PASS with residual density caveat. Contact sheets covering pages 1-46 after the rebuild did not show a new obvious blocking crop, occlusion, caption collision, page-edge cut, blank page, or incomplete figure display. Dense navigation and VLM pages remain readability tradeoffs, not visible clipping blockers in this pass.

commands_run: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k 'supplement_theory_bridge_is_registered_and_dense or acl_supplement_theory_has_visual_evidence_bridge or supplement_material_claim_boundary_atlas_is_registered_and_dense or supplement_material_decision_map_is_registered_and_dense'

rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|LaTeX Warning: Reference|Warning:.*Label|undefined|Rerun to get|Label\\(s\\) may have changed|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.log
follow_up_risks: The pass targets obvious reader-blocking visual failures, not a full OCR or semantic correctness audit.
Several navigation and VLM pages remain intentionally dense; if the submission budget allows, a separate readability pass could trade page count for larger panels.
Future supplement bridge bands should avoid cover-fitting multi-row evidence atlases unless the crop is explicitly part of the figure design.
